topic_title: Nunes Marques takes office as President of Brazil's Superior Electoral Court
topic_summary: Kassio Nunes Marques has assumed the presidency of the TSE, emphasizing the defense of freedom of expression and the integrity of electronic voting machines. His appointment is closely watched by allies of Jair Bolsonaro, given his previous votes regarding the former president's eligibility.
